rminka 0.1.0.9000
  • Get Started
  • Reference
    • Introduction to rminka
    • News (Changelog)
    • Releases

Package index

Project Queries

A set of complementary functions to find projects and their associated observations.

mnk_proj_byname()
Search Minka Projects by Name
mnk_proj_info()
Get Metadata for a Minka Project
mnk_proj_user()
Get Project Users With Metadata
mnk_proj_obs()
Download Project Observations by Year

User Queries

Functions to find users and their contributed observations.

mnk_user_byname()
Search Minka Users by Login Name
mnk_user_info()
Get Information About a Specific Minka User
mnk_user_proj()
Projects Subscribed by a Minka User
mnk_user_obs()
Download User Observations by Year

Place Queries

Functions to find places and retrieve their spatial data and their associated observations.

mnk_place_byname()
Search Minka Place by Name
mnk_place_sf()
Get Minka Place as sf Object
mnk_place_obs()
Download Place Observations by Year

Observation Queries

A variety of functions to fetch observation data based on different parameters.

mnk_obs_id()
Get Minka Observation Details
mnk_obs()
Download Minka Observations
mnk_obs_byday()
Download Minka Observations by Date Range

Auxiliary functions

A set of functions with different utilities that complement Minka’s observational data and help in processing them when used in other R packages (vegan, dismo, labdsv or others).

export_mnk_qgis()
Export sf Minka Objects to a GeoPackage for QGIS
mnk_obs_sf()
Convert Minka Observations to sf
get_wrm_tax()
Get WoRMS Taxonomy
shrt_name()
Generate Short Name from Scientific Name

On this page
